tools.name: analyze_competitors
tools.description: Analyze the competitive landscape for a business. Returns competitor profiles, market positioning, strengths/weaknesses, and strategic recommendations.

tools.name: industry_research
tools.description: Research any industry in depth. Returns market size, growth trends, key players, customer segments, opportunities, challenges, and strategic recommendations.

tools.name: swot_analysis
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive SWOT analysis for any business. Evaluates strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats using real-time competitive data.

tools.name: market_trends
tools.description: Track emerging market trends for any industry. Analyzes growth patterns, technology shifts, consumer behavior changes, and competitive dynamics.

tools.name: customer_persona
tools.description: 🔒 [Pro] Build detailed customer personas with demographics, psychographics, buying behavior, and pain points. Uses real market data to create actionable buyer profiles.

tools.name: pricing_analysis
tools.description: 🔒 [Pro] Analyze competitive pricing strategies. Compare market rates, identify pricing opportunities, and get data-backed pricing recommendations.

tools.name: local_market_analysis
tools.description: 🔒 [Pro] Deep local market intelligence. Analyzes competition density, demographics, demand indicators, and growth opportunities in a specific geographic area.

tools.name: business_plan_section
tools.description: 🔒 [Business] Generate professional business plan sections with real market data. Covers executive summary, market analysis, financial projections, operations, and more.
